calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sharon Ceasar for and with Vera Gragnani.

Ms. Ceasar provided history regarding the various law suits, made reference to exhibit B in the amended first and final account and explained that the value of the Estate was $800,000.00 ($701,232.00 from the settlement and $99,215.01 from the sale of the house). The Amended First and Final Report accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Continued To Jan-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Continued To Jan-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2016 Continued To Jan-09-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sharon Ceasar for and with Vera Gragnani.

The Court stated that this matter will need to be continued for an Order to Appear to be issued to Mr. Steinhauer, that fees were paid without a court order and that there needs to be clarification from Ms. Gragnani regarding her election of her share. Ms. Ceasar stated that there is a declaration on file. The Court stated that no details were given in the declaration and that fees for extraordinary services need to be approved by the Court. Ms. Ceasar stated that Ms. Gragnani was acting under the Independent Administration of Estates Act and trying to avoid litigation. The Court asked how fees could be determined at that date. Ms. Ceasar stated that it was based on the work done to that date, and asked if a declaration from Mr. Steinhauer would be sufficient. The Court stated that it will not accept a declaration from Mr. Steinhauer, that he must appear and that Ms. Gragnani must file a new declaration specific with detail on the consequences of the election. The Petition for Final Distribution was continued to January 9, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and an Order to Appear will be issued to Mr. Steinhauer.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Prado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Continued To Dec-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Continued To Jun-14-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sharon Ceasar for and with (petitioner) Vera Gragnani.

The Court stated that there are procedural issues on the petition to approve, that there was no response to the examiner's notes and that there was inadequate notice. Ms. Ceasar stated that the only interested parties are the children and their mother and that Eric Steinhauer has been paid. The Court stated that notices have to go out unless they are waived. Ms. Ceasar stated that she will see if Mr. Steinhauer will waive notice for future proceedings. The Court stated that the statutes are clear and that written notice is necessary for minor children. Ms. Ceasar stated that the children are not minors and that there are waivers on file for the adult beneficiary children. The Court stated that Ms. Ceasar needs to respond to the examiner's notes, that notice sent to Ms. Gragnani was returned and that if Ms. Gragnani has a new address it needs to be filed with the court. The probate accounting status report was continued to June 14, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-12-2016 Continued To May-10-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that this is the administrator's petition to approve a status report, that there are issues regarding notice and that the administrator has not responded to notes sent by the probate examiner. An Order to Appear will be issued to the administrator Vera Gragnani and the Attorney Sharon Ceasar to appear on May 10, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they have not responded to notes and why they did not appear today. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Continued To Apr-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sharon Ceasar for Vera Gragnani (Petitioner)

The Court addressed the issue of payments being made without prior court approval and the request for partial distribution. Ms. Ceasar stated that the payment made to Atty. Eric Steinhauer was part of a settlement, regarding the payments on the house, Vera Gragnani had the right to obtain a loan to make repairs citing 10406(b), that this was done prior to her becoming attorney of record and it is valid since Ms. Gragnani has independent authority powers and that there are no creditors claims or liens on the estate to hinder the distributions.

The Court stated that distributions will be made according to court calculations. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Nancy Wong. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
